name: tempow
description: Advanced task timer and 24-hour clock planner with PWA support

scripts.start:node: node --input-type=module -e "import http from 'http'; import fs from 'fs'; import path from 'path'; const server = http.createServer((req, res) => { const file = path.join(process.cwd(), req.url === '/' ? 'index.html' : req.url); try { res.end(fs.readFileSync(file)); } catch { res.statusCode = 404; res.end('Not found'); } }); server.listen(3000, () => console.log('Server at http://localhost:3000')); }}
scripts.build: echo 'No build required - PWA ready to deploy'
scripts.test: echo 'Run in browser and check DevTools'
scripts.generate:icons: echo 'Icons are embedded as SVG data URIs'
scripts.validate:sw: node -e "console.log(require('fs').readFileSync('service-worker.js', 'utf8').includes('CACHE_NAME')); console.log('✓ Service Worker is valid')"
scripts.audit: npm run validate:manifest && npm run validate:sw

author: Tempow Team

icons.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 192 192'><circle cx='96' cy='96' r='90' fill='%235de0a8'/><circle cx='96' cy='96' r='85' fill='%230e0e11'/><circle cx='96' cy='96' r='80' fill='%235de0a8'/><text x='96' y='125' text-anchor='middle' font-size='70' fill='%230e0e11' font-family='system-ui' font-weight='bold'>TW</text></svg>
